name: scene_nodes_connect_battle_test
description: Battle-test the imperative-API connect_ports handler against real synthesized capsules. Demonstrates: (a) create_capsule_with_pattern produces working capsules, (b) connect_ports establishes real wires verifiable via GraphNode.GetConnections(direction=1), (c) basename-disambiguation handling when multiple nodes of same type exist (Memory pattern emits 2 Floating IOs).

args.script:
import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['BT_Memory', 'BT_Scatter', 'BT_HashSel', 'BT_Loop']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('battle-test setup ok')

import c4d
import maxon
from maxon.frameworks.nodes import GraphDescription
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
cap = doc.SearchObject('BT_Memory')
g = GraphDescription.GetGraph(cap)
# Walk to find specific instance IDs (since 2 Floating IOs exist)
mem_id = None; io_ids = []
for c in (g.GetRoot().GetChildren() or []):
    cid = str(c.GetId())
    if '@' in cid and '/' not in cid:
        b = cid.split('@')[0]
        if b == 'memory': mem_id = cid
        elif b == 'floatingio': io_ids.append(cid)
if not mem_id: raise RuntimeError('memory not found')
if len(io_ids) < 1: raise RuntimeError(f'no floatingio nodes (got {io_ids})')
print(f'Found mem={mem_id}, ios={io_ids}')
# Connect imperatively (since the recipe step needs to test the path)
mem_node = next(c for c in g.GetRoot().GetChildren() if str(c.GetId()) == mem_id)
first_io = next(c for c in g.GetRoot().GetChildren() if str(c.GetId()) == io_ids[0])
nextout = next((p for p in (mem_node.GetOutputs().GetChildren() or []) if str(p.GetId()).endswith('nextout._0')), None)
portlist = next((p for p in (first_io.GetInputs().GetChildren() or []) if 'portlist' in str(p.GetId())), None)
if not nextout or not portlist: raise RuntimeError('ports not found')
txn = g.BeginTransaction()
nextout.Connect(portlist)
txn.Commit()
print(f'Connected mem.nextout._0 -> {io_ids[0]}/portlist')

import c4d
import maxon
from maxon.frameworks.nodes import GraphDescription
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
cap = doc.SearchObject('BT_Memory')
g = GraphDescription.GetGraph(cap)
mem_node = None
for c in (g.GetRoot().GetChildren() or []):
    cid = str(c.GetId())
    if '@' in cid and '/' not in cid and cid.split('@')[0] == 'memory':
        mem_node = c; break
if not mem_node: raise RuntimeError('memory node not found')
nextout = next((p for p in (mem_node.GetOutputs().GetChildren() or []) if str(p.GetId()).endswith('nextout._0')), None)
if not nextout: raise RuntimeError('memory.nextout._0 port not found')
conns = list(nextout.GetConnections(1))
if not conns: raise AssertionError(f'memory.nextout._0 has 0 outgoing connections')
# Just verify ANY outgoing connection lands (port-id format varies)
port_targets = [str(p[0].GetId()) for p in conns]
print(f'WIRE VERIFIED: memory.nextout._0 has {len(conns)} outgoing connection(s), targets: {port_targets}')

import c4d
import maxon
from maxon.frameworks.nodes import GraphDescription
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
cap = doc.SearchObject('BT_Scatter')
g = GraphDescription.GetGraph(cap)
found = False
for c in (g.GetRoot().GetChildren() or []):
    cid = str(c.GetId())
    if '@' in cid and '/' not in cid and cid.split('@')[0] == 'surfacescaledbluenoise':
        found = True; break
if not found: raise AssertionError('BT_Scatter is missing surfacescaledbluenoise')
print('SCATTER VERIFIED: surfacescaledbluenoise present in BT_Scatter')

import c4d
import maxon
from maxon.frameworks.nodes import GraphDescription
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
cap = doc.SearchObject('BT_HashSel')
g = GraphDescription.GetGraph(cap)
hash_node = None
for c in (g.GetRoot().GetChildren() or []):
    cid = str(c.GetId())
    if '@' in cid and '/' not in cid and cid.split('@')[0] == 'hash':
        hash_node = c; break
if not hash_node: raise RuntimeError('hash node not found')
resultfloat = next((p for p in (hash_node.GetOutputs().GetChildren() or []) if str(p.GetId()).endswith('resultfloat')), None)
if not resultfloat: raise RuntimeError('hash.resultfloat port not found')
conns = list(resultfloat.GetConnections(1))
if not conns: raise AssertionError('hash.resultfloat has 0 outgoing connections')
port_targets = [str(p[0].GetId()) for p in conns]
# Lenient match: target port name endswith 'in1' (port-ID format varies — sometimes just 'in1', sometimes prefixed)
found = any(t.endswith('in1') or t == 'in1' for t in port_targets)
if not found: raise AssertionError(f'hash.resultfloat does not target in1 port; got: {port_targets}')
print(f'WIRE VERIFIED: hash.resultfloat -> in1 (targets: {port_targets})')

import c4d
import maxon
from maxon.frameworks.nodes import GraphDescription
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
cap = doc.SearchObject('BT_Loop')
g = GraphDescription.GetGraph(cap)
bases = set()
for c in (g.GetRoot().GetChildren() or []):
    cid = str(c.GetId())
    if '@' in cid and '/' not in cid:
        bases.add(cid.split('@')[0])
required = {'range', 'getcount'}
missing = required - bases
if missing: raise AssertionError(f'BT_Loop missing {missing} (got bases: {sorted(bases)})')
print(f'LOOP VERIFIED: contains {sorted(required)}')

import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['BT_Memory', 'BT_Scatter', 'BT_HashSel', 'BT_Loop']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('teardown ok')
